title: Datadog tops 1 billion in quarterly sales as big clients keep growing
text: Datadog Reaches 1 Billion in Quarterly Sales. Major Milestone: Datadog reported Q1 2026 revenue exceeding 1 billion for the first time in company history representing 32 percent year-over-year growth. Customer Expansion: The company saw significant growth among its largest customers with approximately 4,550 customers at 100,000 plus ARR. Profitability: The company maintained strong profitability with 22 percent non-GAAP operating margins and 289 million in free cash flow. Platform Adoption: Over 56 percent of customers now use four or more Datadog products indicating deep platform penetration. AI Customer Base: Management highlighted over 6,500 customers using AI integrations. Strategic Deals: The company signed seven and eight-figure annualized deals with major AI research teams. Guidance Outlook: Datadog raised its full-year 2026 guidance to 4.3-4.34 billion in revenue and 2.36-2.44 in EPS per share.
